[{"ontologyId":"annotation-properties-simple","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"data-property-domain-range-restrictions","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"duo","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"edam","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"efo-hierarchical-properties","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"efo-iri-labels","label":[],"definition":["2022-05-16"]},{"ontologyId":"genepio","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"individuals-anonymous-types-with-inverse","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"inter-ontology-a","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"inter-ontology-b","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"label","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"max-cardinality","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"max-cardinality-ttl","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"oio","label":[""],"definition":["OBO Format metamodel. This meta-ontology is self-describing. OBO metamodel properties are described using OBO metamodel properties","
          This is an OWL translation of an ontology whose native representational form is .obo. The translation was performed using the oboInOwl xslt library. For details, see http://www.berkeleybop.org/obo-conv.cgi
        "]},{"ontologyId":"ontology-annotations-version-chebi","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"ontology-annotations-version-efo","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"ontology-annotations-version-ncbitaxon","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"ontology-annotations-version-obo-date","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl","label":["The OWL 2 Schema vocabulary (OWL 2)"],"definition":["
  This ontology partially describes the built-in classes and
  properties that together form the basis of the RDF/XML syntax of OWL 2.
  The content of this ontology is based on Tables 6.1 and 6.2
  in Section 6.4 of the OWL 2 RDF-Based Semantics specification,
  available at http://www.w3.org/TR/owl2-rdf-based-semantics/.
  Please note that those tables do not include the different annotations
  (labels, comments and rdfs:isDefinedBy links) used in this file.
  Also note that the descriptions provided in this ontology do not
  provide a complete and correct formal description of either the syntax
  or the semantics of the introduced terms (please see the OWL 2
  recommendations for the complete and normative specifications).
  Furthermore, the information provided by this ontology may be
  misleading if not used with care. This ontology SHOULD NOT be imported
  into OWL ontologies. Importing this file into an OWL 2 DL ontology
  will cause it to become an OWL 2 Full ontology and may have other,
  unexpected, consequences.
   "]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-anonymous-inverse-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-asymmetric-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-class","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-class-assertion","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-class-expression-based-on-datatype-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-complex-class-assertions-with-negation","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-data-property-assertion","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-datatype-enumeration","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-datatype-enumeration-nesting-issue","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-datatype-exclusion","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-datatype-exclusion-nesting-issue","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-datatype-minmax","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-datatype-minmax-nesting-issue","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-different-individuals","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-disjoint-classes","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-enumeration-of-individuals","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-functional-data-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-functional-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-individual","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-inverse-inverse-functional-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-inverse-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-irreflexive-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-key-constraint-on-data-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-minimal","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-negative-data-property-assertion","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-negative-object-property-assertion","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-object-property-assertion","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-object-property-domain-range-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-property-chain","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-qualified-cardinality-exact-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-qualified-cardinality-max-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-qualified-cardinality-min-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-reflexive-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-same-individual","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-self-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-sub-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-symmetric-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-transitive-object-property","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-unqualified-cardinality-exact-restriction","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-user-defined-data-type","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-user-defined-data-type-nesting-issue","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"owl2primer-value-restriction-on-individual","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"partof","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"punning-class-individual","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"rdfs","label":["The RDF Schema vocabulary (RDFS)"],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"reified-bnode","label":[],"definition":[]},{"ontologyId":"skos","label":["SKOS Vocabulary"],"definition":["An RDF vocabulary for describing the basic structure and content of concept schemes such as thesauri, classification schemes, subject heading lists, taxonomies, 'folksonomies', other types of controlled vocabulary, and also concept schemes embedded in glossaries and terminologies."]},{"ontologyId":"xmpl","label":[],"definition":[]}]
